locator: Treaty on European Union (consolidated version), Preamble, 4th recital; Official Journal EU C 202, 7 June 2016; text verified at https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/HTML/?uri=CELEX:12016ME/TXT
text: CONFIRMING their attachment to the principles of liberty, democracy and respect for human rights and fundamental freedoms and of the rule of law

locator: Treaty on European Union (consolidated version), Preamble, 1st recital; Official Journal EU C 202, 7 June 2016; text verified at https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/HTML/?uri=CELEX:12016ME/TXT
text: RESOLVED to continue the process of creating an ever closer union among the peoples of Europe
